meaning: n.铜锣,盘形钟vt.打锣作为停车信号
examples: What is the big brass gong and hammer for?
A Chinese-American friend recommended Dr. Gong.
Gong finally even offered a diagnosis for what troubled me.
When provisions do arrive, it will be none too soon for the people of Gong Xing.
Add to this mix the very promising newcomer Zhang, touted as the next Gong Li.
